title: Smile Dog
description: Ever wanted to have that smiling toy poodle that became somewhat prominent on the internet? Well now you have it — in Minecraft🐶
body:
## _Nothing_ will take away its smile... This resource pack replaces all wolves with a custom toy poodle model made to resemble that of a dog owned by a chinese uploader on instagram called "[Abbie Qu](https://www.instagram.com/abbieququ/)". Their dog got popular due to its prominent feature of constantly smiling. **[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) Required**
--- | IRL | In-game | |---------------------|:---------------------:| | ![The dog referenced in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8c0af246667868b4bd4ba559d34a9ac96d3d6d6_0.webp) | ![How the dog looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/809ef4b6fcb64c23623139a745bb4baeb050b209_0.webp) | ---

Big thanks to my friend **Trilbykid** for providing the model! ![The dog in blockbench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38eb9abdf5957327e9fec4496316414443c1ddcf_0.webp)
_I might expand this pack more in the future. Planning to add the **Chow Chow**_
